data_notes: EVENT_REI is interpreted as potential disruption risk, not positive resilience.
Cold_Wave_Resilience_Score is positive: higher means more resilient.
Hybrid sections combine potential resilience and observed impact-focused resilience.
Potential-only sections have no direct NPMRDS observed support and are not treated as low resilience.
NPMRDS2 2025 volume is used as profile demand weight, not actual event-day volume.
processed hourly file includes baseline speed profiles for normalization; baseline-period rows are not present as plotted points
